com.jsyn.unitgen

Interface UnitVoice

  • All Superinterfaces:
    UnitSource
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DrumWoodFM, DualOscillatorSynthVoice, FunctionOscillator, ImpulseOscillator, ImpulseOscillatorBL, MorphingOscillatorBL, NoiseHit, PulseOscillator, PulseOscillatorBL, RedNoise, SawtoothOscillator, SawtoothOscillatorBL, SawtoothOscillatorDPW, SineOscillator, SineOscillatorPhaseModulated, SquareOscillator, SquareOscillatorBL, SubtractiveSynthVoice, TriangleOscillator, UnitOscillator, WaveShapingVoice

    public interface UnitVoice
extends UnitSource
    A voice that can be allocated and played by the VoiceAllocator.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2011 Mobileer Inc
    See Also:
    VoiceDescription, Instrument

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      UnitGenerator getUnitGenerator()
      Typically a UnitVoice will be a subclass of UnitGenerator, which just returns "this".
      void noteOff(TimeStamp timeStamp) 
      void noteOn(double frequency, double amplitude, TimeStamp timeStamp)
      Play whatever you consider to be a note on this voice.
      void setPort(java.lang.String portName, double value, TimeStamp timeStamp)
      Looks up a port using its name and sets the value.
      void usePreset(int presetIndex) 

      • Methods inherited from interface com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitSource

        getOutput

    • Method Detail

      • noteOn

        void noteOn(double frequency,
            double amplitude,
            TimeStamp timeStamp)
        Play whatever you consider to be a note on this voice. Do not be constrained by traditional definitions of notes or music.
        Parameters:
        frequency - in Hz related to the perceived pitch of the note.
        amplitude - generally between 0.0 and 1.0
        timeStamp - when to play the note

      • noteOff

        void noteOff(TimeStamp timeStamp)

      • getUnitGenerator

        UnitGenerator getUnitGenerator()
        Typically a UnitVoice will be a subclass of UnitGenerator, which just returns "this".
        Specified by:
        getUnitGenerator in interface UnitSource

      • setPort

        void setPort(java.lang.String portName,
             double value,
             TimeStamp timeStamp)
        Looks up a port using its name and sets the value.
        Parameters:
        portName -
        value -
        timeStamp -

      • usePreset

        void usePreset(int presetIndex)
